§6Modern Markings§f

§aIndustrial wall and floor decorations for high-tech bases!§f
§9Modern Markings§f adds wall and floor decorations suited for many industrial purposes. Use these block markers to design safe walkways, label exits, and organize your nuclear facility's rooms.

§6Key Features§f:
§b• Floor & Wall Decorations§f: Adds clean, modern signs, caution stripes, arrows, and borders for high-tech base structures.
§b• Chisel Integration§f: Use the §bChisel§f tool on placed floor or wall markings to easily toggle and cycle through different line designs, labels, and styles.

§eTip§f: Use caution lines around radioactive machinery in §9HBM's Nuclear Tech§f zones to visually demarcate high-risk radiation containment areas.
